signIn.title: Sign In to Your Account
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back! Let's continue finding the perfect match.

errors.default: An error occurred while requesting a password reset.

resetPassword.passwordHint: Must contain at least 8 characters, an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.

alerts.resendSuccess: A new verification email has been sent successfully. Please check your inbox.

errors.linkInvalid: The account setup link is invalid or missing. Please use the link sent to your email.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

errors.title: Error

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.subtitle: We're happy you've chosen to join us. Let's start with a short and simple registration process that will allow us to get to know you better.

basicInfo.title: Account Details
basicInfo.passwordHint: Password must contain at least 8 characters, an uppercase English letter, a lowercase English letter, and a number.
basicInfo.termsDisclaimer: By clicking 'Create Account', I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

existingUser.loggingInDescription: Looks like you already registered! Trying to log in with your password...

errors.title: Registration Error

errors.fillFields: Please fill in all required fields correctly.

personalDetails.engagementConsentLabel: Yes, I'd like to receive tips, AI insights, and personal feedback from the team to help me improve my profile and find a match faster.

photos.title: Your Photos
photos.subtitle: Good photos significantly increase your chances of successful matches
photos.maxPhotosError: You can upload up to 5 photos
photos.invalidTypeError: Unsupported file type. Please upload JPG, PNG, or WEBP images
photos.tipText: Upload clear photos showing your face. High-quality photos increase your chances of receiving accurate and interesting match suggestions.
photos.required: Please upload at least one photo

aboutMe.title: My Introduction Card
aboutMe.subtitle: This card is what our matchmakers see, and what gets sent to the other side when suggesting a match. Write it as if you're introducing yourself to someone who truly wants to get to know you.
aboutMe.label: Your introduction card
aboutMe.placeholder:
😊 Name: John Smith, 28, height 5'9"
🌍 Background: Ashkenazi/Sephardi
📍 Location: New York
💍 Status: Single
🙏 Modern Orthodox
🎓 Yeshiva University, BA in Business
🇺🇸 Volunteered with NCSY for 2 years
💼 Working in tech as a product manager
🎭 Personality: Friendly, optimistic, love deep conversations
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Warm close-knit family, second of four siblings
🎨 Love sports, hiking, cooking and music
🎯 Looking for someone with a good heart, joy for life, shared values and a sense of humor
aboutMe.shortPlaceholder:
😊 Name, age, height
🌍 Background
📍 Location
💍 Status
🙏 Religious level
...
Write freely!
aboutMe.tooltip: This card gets sent to the other side when a match is suggested – that's how they get a real picture of who you are. Worth the investment!
aboutMe.guidanceTitle: What to include in your card? (in order)
aboutMe.guide12: What I'm looking for in a partner
aboutMe.guidanceNote: 💡 You don't have to include everything, but the more you share, the more accurate your matches will be. Feel free to use emojis like the example, or write freely.
aboutMe.prompt1: What do you enjoy doing in your free time?
aboutMe.prompt2: What values are most important to you?
aboutMe.prompt3: What does your perfect day look like?
aboutMe.prompt4: What are you looking for in a partner?

lookingFor.title: What Are You Looking For?
lookingFor.subtitle: Briefly describe the person you're looking for — it helps us connect the right people
lookingFor.label: Description of Desired Partner
lookingFor.placeholder: e.g.: Looking for someone positive and happy, trustworthy, with family values and faith, open to deep conversations and building a life together...
lookingFor.tooltip: Briefly describe the person you're looking for — important traits, lifestyle, and expectations from the relationship

optionalInfo.title: Additional Information
optionalInfo.subtitle: This information will help us find more accurate matches for you. It is recommended to fill in as many details as possible.

errors.title: Error
errors.missingData: Essential data is missing. Please go back and check your details.

complete.verifyEmailPrompt: Please click the link in the email to complete the verification process.
complete.completeProfileSubtitle: To help us find the best matches for you, please complete your profile details.
complete.verifyPhoneSubtitle: Almost done! Please verify your phone number to activate your account and start receiving matches.
complete.allDoneSubtitle: Excellent! All your details are verified and ready. You can now start the process of finding a match.

validationErrors.title: Missing Information
validationErrors.pleaseFill: To proceed, please complete the following fields:

unsubscribePage.successMessage: You have been successfully unsubscribed from our mailing lists.
unsubscribePage.errorMessageDefault: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

accessibilityStatement.pageDescription: The accessibility statement for the {brandName} website.

commitment.title: Our Commitment to Accessibility
commitment.p1: {companyNameLegal}, operating the {brandName} website, considers it of utmost importance to make its services accessible to people with disabilities.
commitment.p2: Accessibility adjustments were made in accordance with the recommendations of the Israeli Standard (IS 5568) for web content accessibility at the AA level, based on the international WCAG 2.1 guidelines.

level.title: Accessibility Level and Compliance
level.item1: Accessibility Level: The site supports the standard's requirements at the AA level.
level.item2: Supported Browsers: The site has been tested and supports the most common modern browsers, including Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Safari, and Microsoft Edge in their latest versions.

features.title: Accessibility Measures on the Site
features.p1: A wide range of technological measures have been implemented on the site.
features.p2: The site features a dedicated accessibility tool that allows users to customize the site's display to their personal needs.

fontAdjustment.title: Font Size Adjustment
fontAdjustment.description: Allows increasing and decreasing the text on the site to the user's comfortable reading level.

contrastModes.title: Display and Contrast Modes
contrastModes.description: Includes a high-contrast mode and a dark display mode (inverted contrast).

readableFont.title: Readable Font
readableFont.description: Switches the site's font to a basic, readable, sans-serif font.

largeCursor.title: Large Cursor
largeCursor.description: Enlarges the mouse cursor for easier identification and navigation.

textToSpeech.title: Text-to-Speech
textToSpeech.description: Enables a text reader that reads selected content with a mouse click.

reduceMotion.title: Reduce Motion
reduceMotion.description: Disables or reduces animations and movements on the site.

features.keyboardNav: Keyboard Navigation: The site is fully adapted for keyboard-only navigation.
features.screenReader: Screen Reader Compatibility: The site was built using correct semantic structure and ARIA attributes.
features.altText: Alternative Text for Images: All significant images on the site have alternative text.
features.accessibleForms: Accessible Forms: All forms on the site include clear labels, group definitions, and filling instructions.
features.noFlashing: Avoidance of Flashing Content: The site does not contain flashing or rapidly moving content.

limitations.title: Non-Accessible Areas and Contact
limitations.p1: We do our best to ensure that all parts of the site are fully accessible.
limitations.p2: If you encounter an accessibility issue or have a suggestion for improvement, we would appreciate it if you contact us.

contact.title: Accessibility Coordinator Details
contact.p1: For any accessibility-related inquiries, you can contact the company's accessibility coordinator:
contact.name: Name: {accessibilityCoordinatorName}
contact.p2: In your inquiry, please include as many details as possible.
contact.p3: This statement was last updated on: {lastUpdatedDate}.

privacyPolicy.pageDescription: {brandName}'s privacy policy. How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacyPolicy.mainTitle: Privacy Policy – Neshama Tech (Jewish Matchpoint Ltd.)

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: We at {companyNameLegal} (Co. No. {companyNumber}), operating under the brand name "Neshama Tech", respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal information you share with us.
introduction.p2: "Personal Information" is defined as information as defined in the Privacy Protection Law, 1981.
introduction.p3: This policy is an integral part of the System's Terms of Use.

consent.title: 1. Consent, Database, and Legal Clarification
consent.p1: By registering for the system, you express your free, explicit, and informed consent to the terms set out in this Policy.
consent.p2: You are under no legal obligation to provide us with information.
consent.p3: You acknowledge that the information you provide will be stored in the Company's database.
consent.p4: If you do not agree to the terms of this Policy, you must refrain from any use of the system.

collectedInfo.title: 2. What information do we collect?
collectedInfo.p1: We collect various types of personal information:

item2.title: Detailed profile information (which may include sensitive information):
item2.subItem3: Medical information (subject to your separate consent).

collectedInfo.subTitle2: 2.2. Information entered into the system by an authorized Company matchmaker:
collectedInfo.p2: An authorized matchmaker may enter details about you into the system.
collectedInfo.p3_1: Cookies, Google Analytics, and tracking technologies:
collectedInfo.p3_2: A "Cookie" is a small text file stored on your device.
collectedInfo.p3_3: The use of non-essential cookies is subject to your explicit consent.
collectedInfo.p3_4: We use the Google Analytics service to collect and analyze anonymous statistical information.
collectedInfo.p3_5: In accordance with Google's terms of service, we inform you that our use of Google Analytics is subject to how Google collects and processes data.
collectedInfo.p3_6: You can control and manage your cookie preferences.
collectedInfo.p3_7: Log Files and Device Data: Our servers automatically collect basic technical information.

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.p1: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

list.item1: To Provide and Operate the Service.

aiServices.title: 3A. Use of Third-Party AI Services
aiServices.p1: Our Service uses third-party AI services to enhance the matchmaking experience.
aiServices.p2: When you use AI-powered features, the following personal data may be sent to Google's Gemini API:

list.item5: Matchmaker notes associated with your profile.

aiServices.p3: This data is sent to Google's servers, which may be located outside of Israel.
aiServices.p4: Google's use of data sent via the Gemini API is governed by Google's API Terms of Service.
aiServices.p5: We may in the future use additional or alternative AI providers.
aiServices.p6: You can opt out of AI-powered features by contacting us.
aiServices.p7: By accepting these terms, you provide your explicit consent to the processing of your personal data by third-party AI services.

sharingInfo.title: 4. With Whom We Share Your Information
sharingInfo.p1: We do not sell or rent your personal information.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.p1: We take reasonable technological and organizational security measures.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.p1: We will retain your personal information as long as your account is active.

yourRights.title: 7. Your Rights
yourRights.p1: According to the Privacy Protection Law, you are entitled to review the information about you.

crossBorder.title: 8. International Data Transfer
crossBorder.p1: The Company may use cloud services whose servers are located outside the borders of Israel.

minors.title: 9. Minors
minors.p1: The service is intended for users over the age of 18 only.

changes.title: 10. Changes to the Privacy Policy
changes.p1: We reserve the right to update this policy from time to time.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.p1: For any question, request, or issue regarding your privacy, please contact us:

termsOfService.pageDescription: The terms of use for the {brandName} matchmaking system.
termsOfService.subTitle: of {brandName} (operated by {companyNameLegal})

introduction.title: 1. Introduction, Definitions, and Agreement to Terms
introduction.p1_3: If you do not agree to these terms, you are not permitted to make any use of the System.

list.itemA: a. "Candidate": A user registered in the system.
list.itemB: b. "User Content": Any information, text, image, or other material uploaded by you.
list.itemC: c. "System Content": All content in the System that is not User Content.

introduction.p1_5: 1.4. Eligibility and Language. Use of the System is permitted for adults (over 18).

userAccount.title: 2. User Account, Obligations, and Prohibited Use

serviceFees.title: 3. Costs and Payments (Beta Stage)
serviceFees.p3_2: 3.2. Notice of Future Change in Pricing Model.
serviceFees.p3_3: You acknowledge that the current pricing model is for a market penetration period only.
serviceFees.p3_5: 3.4. No Refund in Case of Breach.

thirdPartyLinks.title: 5. Links to Third-Party Sites and Services
thirdPartyLinks.p1: The system may contain links to websites operated by third parties.

limitationOfLiability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability and Disclaimer of Warranties

indemnification.title: 7. Indemnification
indemnification.p1: You agree to indemnify the Company and its affiliates.

terminationLaw.title: 8. Termination of Agreement, Law, and Jurisdiction

childSafety.pageDescription: {brandName}'s safety standards for preventing child sexual abuse and exploitation (CSAE/CSAM)
childSafety.emergencyBanner: If you witness an emergency or immediate danger to a child, please contact local authorities or police immediately.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.p1: {companyNameLegal}, operating the {brandName} platform, is absolutely committed to protecting children.
commitment.p2: We implement a zero-tolerance policy towards any content or behavior related to child sexual abuse.

zeroTolerance.title: Zero Tolerance Policy
zeroTolerance.p1: The following actions are strictly prohibited:

prohibitedList.item1: Uploading, sharing, or distributing any CSAM material
prohibitedList.item2: Contacting or attempting to contact minor users
prohibitedList.item3: Grooming - establishing contact with minors for exploitation purposes
prohibitedList.item4: Sharing any sexual content involving minors, in any form
prohibitedList.item5: Any other behavior that endangers child safety

zeroTolerance.consequence: Violation of this policy will result in immediate account suspension, reporting to law enforcement, and legal action.

ageRestrictions.title: Age Restrictions and Verification
ageRestrictions.p1: NeshamaTech is intended for users aged 18 and over only.

measures.item3: Active monitoring to identify minor users
measures.item4: Immediate removal of identified minor accounts

ageRestrictions.p2: Users found to have misrepresented their age will be permanently removed.

detection.title: Detection and Prevention
detection.p1: We use advanced technologies and methods:

methods.item1: Automatic visual content scanning using hash matching technologies
methods.item2: AI systems for detecting suspicious content

reporting.title: Reporting Mechanisms
reporting.p1: We encourage all users to report any suspicious content or behavior.

methods.item1: 'Report' button on every profile or message
methods.item2: Email directly to our safety team
methods.item3: Dedicated reporting form on the website

reporting.anonymity: All reports are kept strictly confidential. Anonymous reporting is available.
reporting.noRetaliation: We guarantee protection against retaliation for anyone who reports in good faith.

steps.step1: Immediate review by our safety team
steps.step4: Evidence preservation for transfer to authorities
steps.step6: Updating the reporter on actions taken

authorities.title: Cooperation with Authorities
authorities.p1: We fully cooperate with law enforcement:

organizations.item2: NCMEC (National Center for Missing & Exploited Children)
organizations.item3: Local authorities in every country where we operate

authorities.p2: Every case of CSAM content is immediately reported to the appropriate authorities.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection and Privacy
dataProtection.p1: When handling child safety reports, we ensure:

measures.item2: Securing sensitive information according to strict standards
measures.item4: Deletion of harmful content from all systems after transfer to authorities

topics.item1: Recognizing warning signs of child abuse
topics.item5: Updates on relevant legislation and regulations

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: For any questions or concerns regarding child safety:
contact.responseTime: We commit to responding to every child safety inquiry within 24 hours.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.p1: This policy is regularly reviewed and updated.

childSafety.footerCommitment: {brandName} is committed to protecting children and maintaining a safe environment for all our users.
